eval_results.name: new-file-detection
eval_results.key_finding: Skill detected all 3 new payment files and correctly identified missing L1 documentation

eval_results.name: layer-classification
eval_results.key_finding: All three files correctly classified into L0/L1/L2 with hierarchy explanation

eval_results.name: doc-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Generated payment.arch.md with correct naming, overview, component list, and code pointers

eval_results.name: sync-validation
eval_results.key_finding: OAuthProvider.ts detected as undocumented; out-of-sync status reported with remediation steps

eval_results.name: incremental-update
eval_results.key_finding: OAuthProvider section added without disturbing existing content; TOC updated correctly

strengths: Accurate detection of new source files requiring documentation
Correct L0/L1/L2 layer classification with clear hierarchy explanation
High-quality architecture doc generation following naming conventions
Precise sync validation identifying specific out-of-sync components
Incremental update preserves existing content while adding new sections
weaknesses: Doc generation tokens are higher than search-only operations due to content synthesis
Complex multi-module projects may require additional passes for full coverage
recommendations: Cache layer classification results to avoid re-computation on subsequent runs
Add confidence score to sync validation report
Support batch incremental updates for multiple new components at once
